_comment: Authored by Claude. News daemon polls these queries every cadence. Emits news_flash events ONLY when a headline contains ≥1 required keyword AND the URL hasn't been seen before AND the query's cooldown has elapsed. Claude updates this as thesis shifts.

queries.note: Apr 22 original expiry — in-principle extension pending. Binary event.
Direct crude oil catalyst — tanker attacks reopen Iran war premium.
OPEC+ approved +206k bpd May. Any surprise supply move = WTI whipsaw.

queries.query: Bank of Japan yen intervention MoF
queries.note: USDJPY near 158-160 intervention zone. MoF escalating verbal. BoJ Apr 27-28.
FOMC Apr 28-29 — Fed hold expected. Year-end cut odds 50%. Any shift = DXY reaction.
Market pricing May hike to 4.35% — highest G10. Key to AUDUSD thesis.
26% tariff active — any deal progress reverses FII flow thesis.
